the newest banner is kinda trash, better to not waste pulls on it
You can pull Arachne and her wheels, 
Then you can build a team : Arachne, Casiah, Horla, Ramona

This should be good enough for you to clear main story
You can use Arachne and casiah with anything for now

Jenkins, Horla , Ramona and Ogier. Tbh, main stories before chapter 7 are easy enough to use whatever you want as long as the character levels are not really low

Currently I run:

Arachne - Liz - Xu - Castor

The problem I encountered is, that I realized, that Xu barely does anything, since I replaced Thais with Castor. Castor and Liz also only provide the same thing: Free cards in Ultra Space for Arachne to strangle folks with her exalt (and clogging the hand, so I guess I should cut either Liz or Castor)

The direct solution probably is to replace Castor once again with Thais, but maybe there is a good recommendation:
Also have 2 prototype horizons I was puzzling over who to use em on (thought either Pollux or Castor maybe)
since your problem currently is that arachne is oneshotting everything without help from liz
i suggest cutting liz and just making it an arachne castor team
you can put in pollux and start prototyping him to e3
castor pollux arachne is a very strong core
last slot can be whoever u want
horla for instance
thais

Do red pool to get more hp
In ch9 final boss, is the phase where the boss has like almost half a million hp the last phase?
I dont know if I'm just playing poorly, but is ghelot team bad here the boss has double digit barrier and its mechanics makes it hard to keep flails<:Tulu_sleepy:1468258202129928387>
yeah its a stinky boss for gelot
should still be doable just very annoying
Yikes i cant kill it with arachne either because it got too much hp
if u got max hp from all the red pools, gelot should be able to sustain through the boss
Plus it has the stupid mission of keeping hp above 50%
so its just a matter of stalling and chipping damage every turn
if u bring leigh and gelot u will never die
and gluttony wheel + step in all the red pools and take hp
normal mode is not very dangerous

I do have leigh is she good enough at E0?

I've been using ghelot arachne thais and aigis, who do i replace?
But hard...
e0 leigh is good enough, replace aigis or arachne
if your arachne is good u might be able to kill the boss through fortress
one good arachne turn is like 250k final verdict already
thats not a lot of damage you need to do
Alright ill try replacing aigis. Arachne helps a lot with the mobs so idk if i can replace her. Thanks.
remember to take every option that increases your max hp
use r wheels, step in red pools
if u have 3k max hp with gelot and leigh then the boss is a walkover
Does arachne work on a full defense team? Or is her Aliemus cost way too much to cheese around with?
She does but u prob need to run winkle if shes ur only source o dmg
People on reddit are suggesting to use Kath and Arachne together but they both clear bosses by themselves so I separate them
You can run arachne caec as a cheap counter team
Arachne cant clear bosses
I've been toying around with ara-arachne, horla, tawil and casiah and it does pretty well
She can do it rn is because of ultra ring
Oh I see
She cant at a5
She definitely can at lower alerts
I see
So does that mean at endgame, arachne and Kath have to be together?
No
Kath doesnt need her
Shes just a nice side grade to something like horla
I see. Thank you
no but arachne needs to be with a real dps
My plan is tawil cus she can cheat out wing cards. That's fine right?
I manage to beat it but damn i couldnt do the beat in 25 turns mission <:cry3:1356082134447558748> im guessing there would be a much better comp to do this or what yikes
yeah the best way is to cheese it with max hp % damage
Which unit can do that?
oe lotan, gdoll, vortice
Vortice is the easiest one so far since her pursuit bypass the fortress stack that the boss have
Gdoll can reduce the boss max hp to 25%
Plus you can reduce its hp by 25% twice with that tulu support card from chapter 6 final boss
So calculating that, you only need to reduce its hp by 25% manually by yourself but yeah this is still quite hard to pull off
Especially when the boss give you shyt amount of debuff and handicap (I especially despise the one that make your lowest arit cost cards discarded when you use a card of same awakeners
i have these characters and wonder what my main roaster should look like and if i should pull more on the tentacle banners 😄 Im brand new so any tips are welcomed if you have such.
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:

## General Guide
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly

## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
Handbook

if u dont want her, u can put in aigis
